zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Napton於大約1222年出生在英國瓦維其可爾盧比時，她的父親Adam de Broughton III26歲，母親Isolda de Salceto21歲。她於1242年之前與Roger de Lyons在英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1278年在英國享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Napton于大约1222年出生在英国瓦維其可爾盧比时，她的父亲Adam de Broughton III26岁，母亲Isolda de Salceto21岁。她于1242年之前与Roger de Lyons在英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1278年在英国享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Napton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Napton on the Hill (Warwicks), which is recorded as Nepton in 1086, Neapton in 1199, and Cnapton in 1235. The place-name derives from Old English cnæpp ‘hill-top, hillock, a short sharp ascent’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

variants.name: Nappin
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Napton  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Napton was born about 1222, in Rugby, Warwickshire, England, her father, Adam de Broughton III, was 26 and her mother, Isolda de Salceto, was 21. She married Roger de Lyons before 1242, in Warkworth, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1278, in England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Napton est née environ 1222, à Rugby, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Broughton III, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isolda de Salceto, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Lyons avant 1242, à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1278, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Napton um 1222 in Rugby, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam de Broughton III 26 und ihre Mutter Isolda de Salceto 21. Sie hat vor 1242 in Warkworth, Northumberland, England Roger de Lyons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1278 im Alter von 57 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Napton è nata il circa 1222 nel Rugby, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Adam de Broughton III, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Isolda de Salceto, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Lyons prima del 1242, nel Warkworth, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1278, nel England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Naptonが約1222年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアルグビーで生まれた時，父Adam de Broughton IIIは26歳，母Isolda de Salcetoは21歳であった。1242年以前にイギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスでRoger de Lyonsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1278年にイギリスで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Napton(이)가 대략 1222년 영국 워윅실르 루그비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Broughton III(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isolda de Salceto(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1242년 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에서 Roger de Lyons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1278년 영국에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Napton nasceu aproximadamente 1222, em Rugby, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Broughton III, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isolda de Salceto, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Lyons antes 1242, em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1278, em Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Napton родилась около 1222 г. в местности ругби, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam de Broughton III было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolda de Salceto, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Lyons перед 1242 г. в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1278 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Napton nació aproximadamente 1222, en Rugby, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam de Broughton III, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isolda de Salceto, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Roger de Lyons antes de 1242, en Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1278, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
